body: Health Expand Menu Humanizing healthcare People expect intuitive access to their healthcare and personalized experiences. Leaders that reinvent to create easy access and engaging experiences will stay resilient while delivering better outcomes. Gen AI amplified 83% of healthcare executives are piloting gen AI in pre-production environments, but fewer than 10% are investing in the infrastructure necessary for enterprise-wide deployment.
